metadata.description: DuckDB spatial/GIS analytics plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: duckdb-skill
plugins.description: DuckDB v1.5 spatial/GIS analytics — 155+ ST_* functions, GeoParquet, GDAL formats, Overture Maps, Iceberg, DuckLake, H3/A5/S2, raster, FTS, vector search. Auto-detects DuckDB CLI, uv/uvx, and Python environment.
